Name: HWiNFO Sensors
Author: Stephen Lawrensen
Description: Live HWiNFO sensor readings on your Stream Deck: temperatures, clocks, fan speeds, voltages, power and usage, rendered with seven display themes, sensor-type accents, warn/critical alert colors, sparklines and stat modes, plus dial and touchscreen support on the Stream Deck + and Stream Deck + XL. A key can stack two readings or show four in a quad grid with per-cell colors, and a dial's touchscreen can list the rotation set as an overview: three compact rows, or two rows with big values and trend sparklines. Requires HWiNFO with Shared Memory Support or Gadget reporting enabled; auto mode picks the best available source and recovers on its own when HWiNFO restarts.

Actions.Name: Sensor Reading
Actions.Tooltip: Display one or two live HWiNFO sensor readings on a key, with thresholds and sparkline.

Actions.Name: HWiNFO Control
Actions.Tooltip: Control Sensor Dials from any key, pedal or Multi Action: switch readings, pause the auto cycle, pin, reset session stats.

Actions.Name: Sensor Dial
Actions.Tooltip: Show a HWiNFO sensor on the touchscreen, as one readout or a three-row overview. Rotate to switch readings, press to reset session min/max.
